meta.title: Hydraulic Jack & Pump Rentals | Applied Engineering & Service
meta.description: Reliable, high-performance hydraulic equipment for lifting, alignment, and maintenance jobs. Available for sale and rental.

header.title: HYDRAULIC JACK & PUMP SOLUTIONS
header.subtitle: Available for Sale and Rental to suit diverse industrial applications

intro.heading: Heavy Lifting Expertise
paragraphs: Our hydraulic jack and pump rental fleet represents the industry's gold standard for controlled heavy lifting. Whether you need to lift 50 tons for routine maintenance or 450 tons for major overhauls, we deliver calibrated, certified equipment with trained operators to ensure safe, precise execution.

cards.label: STANDARD DUTY
cards.description: Routine maintenance, component replacement, alignment tasks

cards.label: HEAVY DUTY
cards.description: Medium-scale lifts, gearbox installation, structural adjustments

cards.label: ULTRA CAPACITY
cards.description: Major overhauls, vessel positioning, emergency recovery

specifications.title: SPECIFICATION MATRIX
footnotes: * All equipment certified to EN 1494 & ASME B30.1 standards
* Test certificates provided with every rental
